description:
Finish the first actionable release by tightening UX copy, docs, and regression coverage after the core surfaces land.

Scope:
- polish footer hints, notices, and keyboard consistency across the new TUI surfaces
- add any lightweight widget/statusline improvements that help background awareness without reopening the architecture
- update package docs to describe `/bw` as a dashboard-first workflow
- update README/docs command references for the new aliases and in-TUI flows
- round out integration coverage for the full operator loop

Primary file lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/README.md`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/**`
- TUI copy/polish files under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/**`
- integration/regression tests under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__`

Acceptance criteria:
- docs describe the new default `/bw` workflow accurately
- keyboard hints and notices are consistent across surfaces
- integration coverage exercises dashboard entry, issue selection, worker actions, and run/delegate flows
- workspace lint/test/typecheck pass cleanly

Parallel-safety note:
- keep this as the final cleanup/polish lane after the feature tickets settle, since it will otherwise collide with active UI copy and docs changes.
title: Polish the default `/bw` workflow, docs, and regression coverage
